method_cn: v6.3 branch-aware 淘汰赛pipeline：赛前证据与专家委员会生成跨阶段机制，MAS rollout同时给出90分钟、若平进入加时、若仍平进入点球的条件路径，Monte Carlo在完整路径树上采样。
architecture_cn: 加时和点球不再是独立后处理输出；它们由同一条MAS条件rollout驱动，前端三Tab只是同一完整路径分布的不同切片，JSON结构保持v6.2.2兼容。

display_path_top3.label_en: 90 minutes 1-0: England advances in normal time.
display_path_top3.summary_en: 90 minutes 1-0: England advances in normal time.

representative_paths.summary_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, DR Congo advances on penalties.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟0-0、加时0-0后仍平，DR Congo点球晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After 0-0 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, DR Congo advances on penalties.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟1-1、加时0-0后仍平，DR Congo点球晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, DR Congo advances on penalties.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟和加时均未分胜负，比赛被压缩为点球随机性与门将/心理优势。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After both 90 minutes and extra time remain level, the match is compressed into penalty randomness plus goalkeeper and psychological edges.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，England加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; England advances in extra time.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟0-0后进入加时，加时增量1-0，England加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 0-0 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; England advances in extra time.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟0-0后进入加时，加时增量0-1，DR Congo加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 0-0 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 0-1; DR Congo advances in extra time.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟打平后，体能、替补深度和风险偏好在加时阶段放大，形成分胜负路径。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After a 90-minute draw, fitness, bench depth and risk preference are amplified in extra time and shape the resolution paths.

representative_paths.summary_en: 90 minutes 0-1: DR Congo advances in normal time.
90 minutes 1-2: DR Congo advances in normal time.
90 minutes 0-2: DR Congo advances in normal time.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 非热门方可能通过常规时间偷袭、加时反击或点球随机性晋级。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: The underdog may advance through a normal-time steal, an extra-time counterattack or penalty randomness.

normal_time.title: 常规时间（90分钟）
normal_time.condition_cn: 完整比赛的90分钟主预测，不含加时和点球。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: England打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: England breaks down the opponent's defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛进入开放往返，双方进攻均有兑现。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match becomes open and end-to-end, with both attacks converting chances.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 若90分钟未分胜负，双方都会管理点球路径；英格兰门将与点球准备略优、紧凑防守对进攻空间的压缩；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Prediction-model rationale based on the corresponding Chinese explanation.; Prediction-model rationale based on the corresponding Chinese explanation.; compact defending compresses attacking space; The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: England打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: England breaks down the opponent's defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入更开放节奏，转换、定位球或领先后空间放大，总进球显著高于主预测低比分重心。
tail_focus.definition_en: Total goals reach at least four.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a more open rhythm; transitions, set pieces or space after a lead push total goals above the low-score center of the main forecast.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: England打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: England breaks down the opponent's defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: England打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: England breaks down the opponent's defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: DR Congo后段冲击，是英格兰右路高位压迫与对手破压能力、紧凑防守对进攻空间的压缩；DR Congo充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Prediction-model rationale based on the corresponding Chinese explanation.; compact defending compresses attacking space; DR Congo fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 早段进球、红黄牌压力、体能或防线失衡导致比赛失去均衡，一方在90分钟内明显拉开。
tail_focus.definition_en: Either team wins by at least three goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: An early goal, card pressure, fatigue or defensive imbalance breaks the match open and one side pulls clearly away within 90 minutes.

tail_focus.label_cn: 爆冷 / 非热门方取胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 赛前或主预测中相对不被看好的一方在90分钟获胜。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: DR Congo通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: DR Congo gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition play.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: DR Congo通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: DR Congo gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition play.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: DR Congo充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: DR Congo fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: DR Congo充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: DR Congo fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 若90分钟未分胜负，双方都会管理点球路径；英格兰门将与点球准备略优；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Prediction-model rationale based on the corresponding Chinese explanation.; Prediction-model rationale based on the corresponding Chinese explanation.; The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 非热门方通过低位韧性、反击效率、定位球或热门方关键失误，在90分钟直接改变胜负方向。
tail_focus.definition_en: The side rated lower before the match or in the main forecast wins within 90 minutes.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The underdog changes the result within 90 minutes through low-block resilience, counterattacking efficiency, set pieces or a key mistake by the favorite.

key_factors.impact_cn: 英格兰小组赛平均控球65.3%，明显高于DR Congo的38.5%。
key_factors.impact_en: England averaged 65.3% possession in the group stage, clearly above DR Congo's 38.5%.
key_factors.text_cn: 英格兰小组赛平均控球65.3%，明显高于DR Congo的38.5%。
key_factors.text_en: England averaged 65.3% possession in the group stage, clearly above DR Congo's 38.5%.

key_factors.impact_cn: 赛前报道预计英格兰要破解DR Congo低位防守，早段机会质量或受限。
key_factors.impact_en: Pre-match reporting expects England to face a low block from DR Congo, so early chance quality may be constrained.
key_factors.text_cn: 赛前报道预计英格兰要破解DR Congo低位防守，早段机会质量或受限。
key_factors.text_en: Pre-match reporting expects England to face a low block from DR Congo, so early chance quality may be constrained.

key_factors.impact_cn: Tuchel确认Declan Rice首发，他此前对Panama轮休后可回到中场。
key_factors.impact_en: Tuchel confirmed Declan Rice is expected to start after being rested against Panama, strengthening midfield circulation.
key_factors.text_cn: Tuchel确认Declan Rice首发，他此前对Panama轮休后可回到中场。
key_factors.text_en: Tuchel confirmed Declan Rice is expected to start after being rested against Panama, strengthening midfield circulation.

key_factors.impact_cn: Reece James和Jarell Quansah伤缺，英格兰右后卫位置需由替代方案应对。
key_factors.impact_en: Reece James and Jarell Quansah are out, so England's right-back solution must be validated in the match.
key_factors.text_cn: Reece James和Jarell Quansah伤缺，英格兰右后卫位置需由替代方案应对。
key_factors.text_en: Reece James and Jarell Quansah are out, so England's right-back solution must be validated in the match.

key_factors.impact_cn: DR Congo前三场仅让对手获得合计1.8 xG，防守样本支持其抗压能力。
key_factors.impact_en: DR Congo allowed only about 1.8 xG across its first three matches, supporting its defensive resilience sample.
key_factors.text_cn: DR Congo前三场仅让对手获得合计1.8 xG，防守样本支持其抗压能力。
key_factors.text_en: DR Congo allowed only about 1.8 xG across its first three matches, supporting its defensive resilience sample.

key_factors.impact_cn: 比赛在亚特兰大Mercedes-Benz Stadium进行，场地为约95%天然草的混合草皮。
key_factors.impact_en: The match is at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta on a hybrid-grass surface of about 95% natural grass.
key_factors.text_cn: 比赛在亚特兰大Mercedes-Benz Stadium进行，场地为约95%天然草的混合草皮。
key_factors.text_en: The match is at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta on a hybrid-grass surface of about 95% natural grass.

normal_time.condition_en: The main 90-minute prediction for the match, excluding extra time and penalties.

extra_time.title: 加时赛（如进入）
extra_time.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: England凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result is produced through a counterattack, set piece or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: England wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both teams score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: England在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the extra-time segment reaches three or more total goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: England pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

key_factors.impact_cn: 仅在90分钟打平并进入加时赛的条件分支下：常规时间基础分布显示英格兰90分钟胜率55.4%、平局27.0%、DR Congo胜率17.7%，因此加时触发不是主路径，但并非低概率尾部
key_factors.impact_en: Conditional on the match being level after 90 minutes and entering extra time: the normal-time distribution indicates the extra-time branch is not the main path, but it is still a meaningful scenario rather than a remote tail.
key_factors.text_cn: 仅在90分钟打平并进入加时赛的条件分支下：常规时间基础分布显示英格兰90分钟胜率55.4%、平局27.0%、DR Congo胜率17.7%，因此加时触发不是主路径，但并非低概率尾部
key_factors.text_en: Conditional on the match being level after 90 minutes and entering extra time: the normal-time distribution indicates the extra-time branch is not the main path, but it is still a meaningful scenario rather than a remote tail.

key_factors.impact_cn: 因此90-105分钟英格兰仍更可能主动寻找破局，105分钟后若仍平，双方更可能降低开放进攻，比赛逐步转向定位球、二点球、体能失误和点球准备管理
key_factors.impact_en: Therefore, from minutes 90-105 England is still more likely to seek a breakthrough; if the score remains level after 105 minutes, both sides are likely to reduce open attacking risk and shift toward set pieces, second balls, fatigue errors and penalty-path management.
key_factors.text_cn: 因此90-105分钟英格兰仍更可能主动寻找破局，105分钟后若仍平，双方更可能降低开放进攻，比赛逐步转向定位球、二点球、体能失误和点球准备管理
key_factors.text_en: Therefore, from minutes 90-105 England is still more likely to seek a breakthrough; if the score remains level after 105 minutes, both sides are likely to reduce open attacking risk and shift toward set pieces, second balls, fatigue errors and penalty-path management.

key_factors.impact_cn: 证据整合后，加时赛的核心不是英格兰完全失去优势，而是英格兰控球和定位球主动权继续存在，同时双方风险偏好下降、点球路径管理权重上升
key_factors.impact_en: After evidence integration, the extra-time question is not whether England loses its edge entirely, but whether its possession and set-piece initiative can survive lower risk appetite and growing penalty-path management.
key_factors.text_cn: 证据整合后，加时赛的核心不是英格兰完全失去优势，而是英格兰控球和定位球主动权继续存在，同时双方风险偏好下降、点球路径管理权重上升
key_factors.text_en: After evidence integration, the extra-time question is not whether England loses its edge entirely, but whether its possession and set-piece initiative can survive lower risk appetite and growing penalty-path management.

key_factors.impact_cn: DR Congo则有低位防守、Wissa/Mayele后段反击威胁、Fayulu扑点记录和曾经119分钟换门将准备点球的可验证方案
key_factors.impact_en: DR Congo retains a verifiable counter-path through low-block defending, late Wissa/Mayele transition threat, Fayulu's penalty-save record and the precedent of a 119th-minute goalkeeper change for penalties.
key_factors.text_cn: DR Congo则有低位防守、Wissa/Mayele后段反击威胁、Fayulu扑点记录和曾经119分钟换门将准备点球的可验证方案
key_factors.text_en: DR Congo retains a verifiable counter-path through low-block defending, late Wissa/Mayele transition threat, Fayulu's penalty-save record and the precedent of a 119th-minute goalkeeper change for penalties.

key_factors.impact_cn: 英格兰因Pickford扑点记录、公开点球准备和较深的主罚资源略占点球端优势
key_factors.impact_en: England holds a slight penalty-side edge through Pickford's save record, public penalty preparation and a deeper likely taker pool.
key_factors.text_cn: 英格兰因Pickford扑点记录、公开点球准备和较深的主罚资源略占点球端优势
key_factors.text_en: England holds a slight penalty-side edge through Pickford's save record, public penalty preparation and a deeper likely taker pool.

extra_time.workflow_cn: 加时专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 条件Rollout → 条件蒙特卡洛矩阵 → 加时Tail审计 → 报告输出。
extra_time.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
extra_time.workflow_en: Extra-time workflow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → conditional rollout → conditional Monte Carlo matrix → extra-time tail audit → report output.

penalties.title: 点球大战（如进入）
penalties.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟打平且加时仍平。输入包括90分钟预测、加时Mini-Pipeline结果、点球证据、门将/主罚手/压力因素。

tail_focus.label: 门将连续扑点
tail_focus.definition_cn: 一方门将连续扑点或对手连续罚丢，点球比分被迅速拉开。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves can swing the shootout.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves can swing the shootout.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
tail_focus.definition_en: One goalkeeper makes consecutive saves, or the opponent misses repeatedly, causing the shootout score to separate quickly.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves can swing the shootout.

tail_focus.label: 热门方压力失误
tail_focus.definition_cn: 更被看好的一方在关键轮次罚丢，非热门方点球晋级。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
selected_scores.rationale_en: A key taker for the favorite misses under pressure.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
tail_focus.definition_en: The more favored side misses in a key round and the underdog advances on penalties.
tail_focus.rationale_en: A key taker for the favorite misses under pressure.

tail_focus.label: 延长点球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入6+轮突然死亡后才分胜负。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Both teams execute the first five rounds well, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides perform well through the first five rounds, and the result is decided only in 6+ sudden-death rounds.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Both teams execute the first five rounds well, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

key_factors.impact_cn: 采用点球能力、门将状态、淘汰赛经验与压力因素的保守后备整合
key_factors.impact_en: A conservative fallback synthesis of penalty ability, goalkeeper form, knockout experience and pressure factors.
key_factors.text_cn: 采用点球能力、门将状态、淘汰赛经验与压力因素的保守后备整合
key_factors.text_en: A conservative fallback synthesis of penalty ability, goalkeeper form, knockout experience and pressure factors.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球大战随机性强，应以门将、主罚手深度、淘汰赛经验和心理压力作小幅条件调整
key_factors.impact_en: Penalty shootouts are highly random, so goalkeeper quality, taker depth, knockout experience and pressure should only make small conditional adjustments.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球大战随机性强，应以门将、主罚手深度、淘汰赛经验和心理压力作小幅条件调整
key_factors.text_en: Penalty shootouts are highly random, so goalkeeper quality, taker depth, knockout experience and pressure should only make small conditional adjustments.

key_factors.impact_cn: 公开赛前资料通常无法确认具体点球顺序，点球手只作为经验候选
key_factors.impact_en: Public pre-match information usually cannot confirm the exact penalty order, so takers are treated only as experience-based candidates.
key_factors.text_cn: 公开赛前资料通常无法确认具体点球顺序，点球手只作为经验候选
key_factors.text_en: Public pre-match information usually cannot confirm the exact penalty order, so takers are treated only as experience-based candidates.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球rollout以一球差和延长点球为主，保留门将连续扑点和压力失误路径
key_factors.impact_en: The penalty rollout centers on one-goal margins and sudden-death extensions, while retaining goalkeeper-save and pressure-miss paths.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球rollout以一球差和延长点球为主，保留门将连续扑点和压力失误路径
key_factors.text_en: The penalty rollout centers on one-goal margins and sudden-death extensions, while retaining goalkeeper-save and pressure-miss paths.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球大战常见比分族，结合门将、主罚手和心理压力作保守校准
key_factors.impact_en: Common penalty-shootout score patterns, conservatively calibrated with goalkeeper, taker depth and psychological pressure.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球大战常见比分族，结合门将、主罚手和心理压力作保守校准
key_factors.text_en: Common penalty-shootout score patterns, conservatively calibrated with goalkeeper, taker depth and psychological pressure.

penalties.workflow_cn: 点球专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 点球序列Rollout → 点球比分矩阵 → 点球Tail审计 → 报告输出。
penalties.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes and remains level after extra time; inputs include the 90-minute prediction, extra-time mini-pipeline results, penalty evidence, goalkeepers, takers and pressure factors.
penalties.workflow_en: Penalty workflow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → penalty-sequence rollout → penalty score matrix → penalty tail audit → report output.

method_en: The v6.3 branch-aware knockout pipeline uses pre-match evidence and committee mechanisms across phases; MAS rollout generates conditional paths for 90 minutes, extra time if level, and penalties if still level, while Monte Carlo samples the full path tree.
architecture_en: Extra time and penalties are no longer independent post-processing outputs; they are driven by the same MAS conditional rollout, and the three frontend tabs are slices of one complete path distribution while preserving the v6.2.2-compatible JSON structure.
manual_review_note_cn: 前端展示文案与英文翻译已基于完整预测结果人工复核修正；概率、矩阵和路径分布未改动。
manual_review_note_en: Frontend display text and English translations were manually reviewed against the full prediction outputs; probabilities, matrices and path distributions were not changed.
